rulings.Case Title: AS YOU SOW VS ADG CONCERNS INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: GRANT SUMMARY ADJUDICATION PROP 65 NO TRIABLE ISSUE RE 10 EMPLOYEES. GRANT SUMMARY ADJUDICATION 17200 B&P UNLAWFUL BUSINESS PRACTICE NO TRIABLE ISSUE RE 10 EMPLOYEES. DENY SUMMARY ADJUDICATION 17200 B&P UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICE FAILURE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT FAILS TO DISPOSE OF THEORIES OF UNFAIRNESS OTHER THAN PROP 65 VIOLATION. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DAMAGE PRAYER TREATED AS MOTION TO STRIKE AND GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. DISGORGEMENT NOT PERMITTED. (PB)
